translations.EXECUTOR_NOT_SUPPORTED: Your Executor is not supported, you may find bugs with the Script on an unsupported Executor.
translations.ERROR_NOTIFICATION_DESKTOP: Please open the console by pressing F9 or by typing "/console" in the chat.
translations.ERROR_NOTIFICATION_MOBILE: Please open the console by clicking on the "Settings" tab in the Roblox in-game settings and then clicking the "Open" button under "Developer Console" or by typing "/console" in the chat.
